request_payload.exposure_text: As a nation, we can't afford to be naive about our alliances. While we value our partnerships, we must ask ourselves: are we bearing too much of the burden? Look at what's happening in [Community X]—their local services are struggling because of unexpected defense spending increases. We have a duty to protect our people, but we also need to ensure our commitments don't leave our own communities vulnerable. It's time for a honest conversation about fair burden-sharing. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
